CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lawrence Fasano Jr., 415-432-4401 of Fasano Law Office for Plaintiff.
Damion Young, Esq. 949-864-3400 of Koeller Nebeker Carlson & Haluck LLP for Defendant SWINERTON BUILDERS through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his research and his findings. Plaintiff filed a non-oposition to the Demurrer on 12/28/18 and has now late-filed and amended Complaint. Defendant argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The Court permits Plaintiff to file an Amended Complaint.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
